title: 02Ship
description: A learning portal and community platform for Claude practitioners in Sydney. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Claude Code — from zero to shipped.
content:
## The Problem

67% of Claude users in Sydney had no local community to share builds, get feedback, or learn from each other. Existing AI meetups were too broad and beginner-focused.

## The Build

Using Claude Code as the primary development tool, 02Ship was built as a Next.js 14 static site with:

1. Course platform with video lessons and structured curricula
2. Daily AI news aggregation
3. Blog with MDX support
4. Community Cohorts program for 2-week build sprints
5. Events integration with Luma for monthly meetups

## Results

100+ members joined the community. Monthly meetups running in Sydney. Cohorts program launching to help practitioners go from idea to demo in 14 days.
